rag_rules: Generate AGREE annex blocks using valid syntax: assume/guarantee labels, eq/const declarations, and assign statements
Place assumptions and guarantees in component type scopes for port references, and in implementation scopes for subcomponent bindings
Use initialized temporal recurrence for stateful equations and nested if-then-else for branching logic
Use AGREE logical operators (and, or, not, =>) and implication for clear contract expressions
generic_rules: Use concrete bounds, named constants, or visible relations for input assumptions and output guarantees
Declare AGREE types as int, real, or bool; avoid AADL property names as AGREE variables
Use exact visible identifiers from current component scope; do not invent declarations for unresolved references
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Stateful equations should use initialized temporal recurrence
Branching logic should use nested if-then-else
Use AGREE logical operators for clear contract expressions
anti_patterns: Do not encode AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions without explicit ports or constants
Do not invent declarations for unresolved references; use exact visible identifiers
Do not use AADL property names as AGREE variables
